subject: Adding logging for the main CLAMP
commit_message:
Adding logging for the main CLAMP

Issue-ID: CLAMP-170

Change-Id: I0dcd730efdbe02b333db91629d1e5f90024efb9e
Signed-off-by: ac2550 <ac2550@intl.att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Guys, forgot about this patch (Roger reminded me) - I am pulling the patch and testing it now - we only have today to get it merged in beijing
Do you guys have any operations that will emit some logs without doing closed loop operations - also can you post any test results exercising the filebeat  container - you would just need to see if logs appear in 30253 in kibana

I noticed there are two files:
bash-4.2$ ls -l /var/log/onap/
total 4
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root    0 Jun  5 14:49 Audit-lrmRVer_IS_UNDEFINED-lrmRO_IS_UNDEFINED-Pid_IS_UNDEFINED.log
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root    0 Jun  5 14:49 Perform-lrmRVer_IS_UNDEFINED-lrmRO_IS_UNDEFINED-Pid_IS_UNDEFINED.log
drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 4096 Jun  5 14:49 clamp

I think there is some problem that causes them to be created, but it shouldn't block this review.
Please take care of those files.
Change has been successfully merged by Borislav Glozman

datag should be data - but filebeat will fix this by creating its own data dir
